page: Microsoft Azure D192s_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Dsv7 server family. It is equipped with 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features 768.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPUs. However, it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external storage attachments. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

From a resource-density perspective, the D192s_v7 offers a high-capacity profile suitable for enterprise-scale workloads that require substantial parallel processing without the need for specialized GPU hardware. The balanced memory-to-core ratio makes it appropriate for large-scale general-purpose applications, relational databases, enterprise application hosting, and highly parallelized CPU-bound tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D192s_v7 is a high-capacity virtual machine from the Dsv7 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel processors. Managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance features 192 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external storage volumes. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for large-scale enterprise deployments, the D192s_v7 is optimized for highly parallelized workloads, large databases, and demanding general-purpose applications that require massive CPU and memory resources without specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D192s_v7 is a Dsv7-family virtual machine featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for highly parallelized enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density virtual machine featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated cores and a balanced memory profile for enterprise-scale parallel processing.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external disk attachment

Optimized for large-scale enterprise applications and parallel processing
